description: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter motorcycle club founded in San Bernardino, California on April 1, 1956. It expanded internationally, gaining notoriety in Australia, the United States, Germany, and Norway. The club is known for its violent criminal activities, including drug trafficking, homicide, and arson. In Australia, it is considered one of the most violent bikie gangs and was involved in the 2001 car bomb murder of former detective Don Hancock.

country_links.evidence_quote: In November 1969, Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club Australia was founded by former members of the St Mary's Motorcycle Club... Sydney was the first chapter.
country_links.context: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club has chapters and carries out violent activities in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Australia, Germany , Norway , Brazil and the United States
country_links.context: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club has territory in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: Though founded in the United States, the MC expanded successfully overseas and gained significant notoriety in Australia, the United States, Germany and Norway.
country_links.context: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club expanded successfully to Germany.

country_links.evidence_quote: Gypsy Joker MC Norway started out as a local Harley Davidson club on 1 April 1997.
country_links.context: The Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club established a chapter in Norway and operates there.
